name: Idaho Comp for Construction Chemical Exposure

mainEntity.name: Does Idaho cover chemical exposure for construction workers in West Valley City?
mainEntity.text: Does Idaho cover chemical exposure for construction workers in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Idaho covers construction toxics like silica/asphalt fumes if disabling and work-linked.

suggestedAnswer.text: West Valley cross-border: Idaho if employed there. Benefits match Utah but higher maxs. File Industrial Commission. Construction claims prove via union logs. Beware jurisdiction—local firms clarify.

description: Yes, Idaho covers construction toxics like silica/asphalt fumes if disabling and work-linked.
